blocks.name: MTEB (Massive Text Embedding Benchmark)
blocks.description: Community benchmark for text, image, and audio embedding models. I contribute features, fixes, and evaluations upstream—84+ pull requests on embeddings-benchmark/mteb.

prs.title: Add hybrid models in MTEB
prs.summary: Support for hybrid (dense + sparse fusion) embedding models.

prs.title: Load aggregated results from task results
feat: Add tracking of run settings
prs.summary: Reproducibility and telemetry for benchmark submissions.

prs.title: feat: Add evaluation runtime for all models
prs.summary: Enables tracking execution time and speed benchmarks for embedding models.

prs.title: fix: Make ModelMeta hashable
prs.summary: Refactored core metadata classes to support hashing and caching mechanisms.

prs.title: Refactor queries and document dataloader to allow multiple modalities
feat: Add submit_results to ResultsCache
prs.summary: Automated result submission workflow for leaderboard submissions.

prs.title: Added embedding parameter value for image and audio models
prs.summary: Metadata for image/audio model runs on the leaderboard.

prs.title: fix: Make `mteb.get_model` compatible with `CrossEncoders`
prs.summary: Ensured mteb.get_model is fully compatible with CrossEncoder models for reranking evaluations.

prs.title: fix: Update metadata to include active parameter
prs.summary: Added active parameter attributes to model metadata for better run configuration tracking.

prs.title: Add filter for model type
prs.summary: Added model-type filters (dense, sparse, late-interaction) for embedding selection.

prs.title: fix: Add model_type in ModelMeta
prs.summary: Added model-type metadata categorization for benchmark models.

prs.title: Add model specific dependencies
prs.summary: Isolated and resolved model-specific python dependency loading in benchmark pipelines.

prs.title: fix: Added Filter Modality
prs.summary: Introduced modality-based filtering (text/image/audio) to help users query models for specific modalities.
